name: rtbrick-mcp-server
description: Access RTBrick's website, RBFS technical documentation, and YouTube training videos directly from your AI assistant. No API key required.

environmentVariables.name: CONFIG_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a custom config.json file. If unset, built-in defaults are used.

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Logging verbosity (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR). Default: INFO.

tools.name: fetch_rtbrick_page
tools.description: Fetch the content of any page on an allowed RTBrick or YouTube domain (www.rtbrick.com, documents.rtbrick.com, www.youtube.com). Only https:// URLs are accepted.

tools.name: get_rtbrick_website
tools.description: Fetch the RTBrick main website (https://www.rtbrick.com) and return its text content.

tools.name: get_tech_docs_index
tools.description: Fetch the RTBrick technical documentation index at https://documents.rtbrick.com/techdocs/current/index.html.

tools.name: search_tech_docs
tools.description: Keyword search across all configured RTBrick RBFS technical documentation pages. Returns relevance-ranked results with context snippets.

tools.name: list_tech_docs
tools.description: List all 23 configured RTBrick technical documentation pages with their relative paths and full URLs.

tools.name: get_rtbrick_videos
tools.description: Fetch metadata for RTBrick's YouTube training-video playlist using the YouTube oEmbed API. Returns title, channel, thumbnail, and playlist URL.

tools.name: get_youtube_video_info
tools.description: Fetch oEmbed metadata (title, channel, thumbnail, dimensions) for a specific RTBrick YouTube video URL.
